description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa has three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion for the main seating area, with an additional cushion forming the chaise. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric silhouette. The legs are short, minimally visible, and positioned at the corners, likely made of plastic or wood. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This sofa is designed for comfort and functionality, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with a chaise lounge, boxy armrests, and three large back cushions. The design is clean, geometric, and comfortable, with smooth upholstery and minimal visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform height and alignment of the backrest and armrests, with three back cushions visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the main seat end, showing the sofa's length, armrest, and the transition to the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion for the main section, with an additional cushion for the chaise; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests of equal height to the backrest, with a flat profile and no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, minimally visible legs located at the corners, likely block-style and made of plastic or wood, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest segmented into three sections by the individual back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
